channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: The Enabot EBO X continues to be my favorite Alexa-powered pet companion robot on wheels
item.description: The Enabot EBO X isn't the most popular pet and home security robot offered by the brand. Yet, I still continue to favor it over the rest of the models.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Enabot EBO X smart guardian robot
media:content.media:text: Enabot EBO X smart guardian robot
media:content.media:title: Enabot EBO X smart guardian robot

item.title: The "most stylish" Galaxy Watch 8 Classic is 31% off at Amazon right now
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 classic is a great pick if you prefer a more traditional look.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic sitting next to an Android figurine, the display showing "Developer options."
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic sitting next to an Android figurine, the display showing "Developer options."
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic sitting next to an Android figurine, the display showing "Developer options."

item.title: These are the 3 new Galaxy S26 camera features that leveled up my captures instantly
item.description: Samsung didn't upgrade the Galaxy S26 camera hardware, but it did improve the shooting experience with these key software tricks.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.

item.title: Samsung Messages is going away, so here are 5 the best messaging alternatives
item.description: Here are the best messaging apps to replace Samsung Messages before it shuts down.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: A Voice Message Transcript on Google Messages
media:content.media:text: A Voice Message Transcript on Google Messages
media:content.media:title: A Voice Message Transcript on Google Messages

item.title: Prices on tech are going up everywhere... are you less likely to buy a new phone this year?
item.description: RAM shortages are driving up smartphone prices and already causing a decline in smartphone shipments. In our latest poll, we want to know if the rising prices are affecting your willingness to buy a new smartphone this year.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 vs. Galaxy Z Flip 6: It's probably time to upgrade soon
item.description: With the Galaxy Z Flip 8 likely coming soon, it's time to take a look at how the Galaxy Z Flip 6 might compare.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Leaked render of the Galaxy Z Flip 8
media:content.media:text: Leaked render of the Galaxy Z Flip 8
media:content.media:title: Leaked render of the Galaxy Z Flip 8

item.title: 5 Android Auto settings I always change on any new Android phone
item.description: Android Auto is the most intuitive and safest way to enjoy all your essential apps when driving. If you’re just starting out, here are five settings we suggest you change right away for a more pleasant driving experience.
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: Android Auto welcome screen when setting up AAWireless.
media:content.media:text: Android Auto welcome screen when setting up AAWireless.
media:content.media:title: Android Auto welcome screen when setting up AAWireless.

item.title: Should you wait for the Motorola Razr 2026? Well, it's complicated...
item.description: Motorola is expected to launch the Razr 2026 series soon, but are the phones worth waiting for? Let's take a look.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: The Razr Ultra 2025 AI key
media:content.media:text: The Razr Ultra 2025 AI key
media:content.media:title: The Razr Ultra 2025 AI key

item.title: 3 reasons I love the Clicks Keyboard for Motorola Razr and 3 things I don't like
item.description: I've been using the CLicks Keyboard for the Motorola Razr for several weeks. Here are the things I like and don't like about the keyboard case.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Test
media:content.media:text: Test
media:content.media:title: Test

item.title: Horizon Lock on the Galaxy S26 Ultra is amazing, but Motorola did it first. Here's how they compare
item.description: Motorola has had the ultra-steady Horizon Lock video recording feature for years, but did Samsung upstage the company's efforts with its similar Galaxy S26 feature? I test them to find out.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: A blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra next to a green Motorola Edge 2025
media:content.media:text: A blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra next to a green Motorola Edge 2025
media:content.media:title: A blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra next to a green Motorola Edge 2025

item.title: Even Netflix is getting in on vertical videos, mobile app redesign gets discussed
item.description: While Netflix is busy raising prices, it's teased in its Q1 2026 report that it plans to bring veritical videos to members.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Netflix splash screen on a tablet
media:content.media:text: Netflix splash screen on a tablet
media:content.media:title: Netflix splash screen on a tablet

item.title: Reddit users grill Samsung exec on overwhelming Galaxy AI and compact phones
item.description: A Samsung exec held an AMA on Reddit, looking to answer lingering questions and concerns on Galaxy users' minds about AI and small phones.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy AI Banner
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy AI Banner
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy AI Banner

item.title: Google builds on its hotel price tracking for Android with a summer update
item.description: A summer-focused update is rolling out for mobile and desktop users, as Google makes its hotel price tracker a little more customizable.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google gets users prepared for summer with a hotel price tracking update for Android and desktops.
media:content.media:text: Google gets users prepared for summer with a hotel price tracking update for Android and desktops.
media:content.media:title: Google gets users prepared for summer with a hotel price tracking update for Android and desktops.

item.title: When does the Motorola Razr 2026 launch?
item.description: Motorola is expected to launch the Razr 2026 series soon, but when can we expect the phones to arrive? Here's what we think.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: The Razr Ultra 2025 with the Razr Plus 2025 and Razr 2025

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 vs. Pixel 10 Pro Fold: Samsung's next vs Google's best
item.description: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 is still months away, but leaks already show how it could stack up against the Pixel 10 Pro Fold in performance, cameras, and design.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

item.title: This 'surprising' Lenovo Chromebook has crashed back to a Black Friday price at Best Buy
item.description: As part of its Ultimate Upgrade sale, Best Buy is carving over 50% off the Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3 Chromebook.

item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3 Chromebook review

item.title: Not every Galaxy S27 will get this rumored UFS 5.0 storage upgrade next year
item.description: Another early Galaxy S27 rumor said Samsung might look at a UFS storage upgrade for "some" models.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Galaxy S26 Plus face down on a table
media:content.media:text: Galaxy S26 Plus face down on a table
media:content.media:title: Galaxy S26 Plus face down on a table

item.title: Yes, Visible will really give you $480 when you buy the Samsung Galaxy S26 — but there's a catch
item.description: New and existing customers who sign up for Visible's Plus Pro plan will score $480 when they buy the Samsung Galaxy S26.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.

item.title: Solid-state battery tech is finally mainstream, starting with BMX SolidSafe power banks
item.description: Lithium-ion batteries are highly flammable, spurring airport restrictions on power banks. Solid-state battery tech is here to change that.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: BMX SolidSafe 5K and 10K Solid-State Magnetic Power Bank with Qi2 and MagSafe support
media:content.media:text: BMX SolidSafe 5K and 10K Solid-State Magnetic Power Bank with Qi2 and MagSafe support
media:content.media:title: BMX SolidSafe 5K and 10K Solid-State Magnetic Power Bank with Qi2 and MagSafe support

item.title: Samsung Galaxy A57 vs. Galaxy A56: Is it a worthy successor?
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy A57 is slimmer, lighter, and has more AI features than the Galaxy A56. But is it worth paying full price when the Galaxy A56 now available for less?
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy A56 against a colorful background
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy A56 against a colorful background
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy A56 against a colorful background

item.title: Samsung Galaxy A57 vs. Google Pixel 10a: Higher price or older chip?
item.description: The Google Pixel 10a slightly underwhelmed fans with a last-gen chip, but is it better than the higher-priced Samsung Galaxy A57? Let's find out.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The camera system on the Galaxy A57.
media:content.media:text: The camera system on the Galaxy A57.

item.title: This Galaxy S26 Ultra case is a mobile gamer's dream come true
item.description: Aulumu makes an Aramid fiber case that does something no other case does: keeps your phone cool, even when playing intense mobile games.

item.title: Samsung’s new kids tablet adds $100 for parental controls and a bouncy case
item.description: Samsung’s $350 Tab A11+ Kids Edition offers seven years of updates, but you’re definitely paying a $100 premium for a rugged bumper and some stickers.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy Tab A11+ Kids Edition screen
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy Tab A11+ Kids Edition screen
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy Tab A11+ Kids Edition screen

item.title: Now Brief for your Samsung TV is a reality with this SmartThings update
item.description: Samsung detailed an update for its SmartThings ecosystem that brings the Galaxy S26's Now Brief to homes.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Morning Now Brief on Galaxy S25 Ultra

item.title: OnePlus' Europe exit isn't official yet, but the signs aren't great
item.description: The company is said to be shifting focus toward China and select key regions.

item.title: Google may bring glowing notifications to Pixels and its next laptop
item.description: Google’s apparently bringing back the light bar with Pixel Glow, a flashy AI notification trick for the upcoming Pixel 11 and a brand-new Pixel laptop.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Pixel 10 in Indig

item.title: Moto G Stylus 2026 vs. Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra: Two styluses, two price points
item.description: Motorola is upgrading the Moto G Stylus 2026 with an active stylus. Is it finally enough to make it a Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra competitor?
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Moto G Stylus 2026 next to the pen on a table

item.title: Android 17 hits a major milestone as Google releases its last 'scheduled' beta

item.title: Verizon wants to give you a free Galaxy S26 Ultra AND a $100 gift card, just for kicks — here's the deal
item.description: Verizon has just leveled up one of its best deals by adding a free $100 gift card when you buy a phone and add an eligible line on its website!
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: Moto G Stylus 2026 vs. Moto G Stylus 2025: When a pen is mightier than specs
item.description: The Moto G Stylus 2026 finally features an active stylus, the best waterproofing, and a larger battery. Time to see if these upgrades are truly worth $100 more than the Moto G Sylus 2025.
item.author: roydon.cerejo@gmail.com (Roydon Cerejo)
item.dc:creator: Roydon Cerejo

media:content.media:description: Moto G Stylus 2026 next to the Stylus 2025
media:content.media:text: Moto G Stylus 2026 next to the Stylus 2025

item.title: Samsung's horrendous Galaxy price hike in the US makes me worried, and you should be, too
item.description: Samsung was spotted raising prices for a host of devices in the U.S., which sees totals rising sharply, ripping more from consumers.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy Tab S11 and S11 Ultra.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy Tab S11 and S11 Ultra.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy Tab S11 and S11 Ultra.

item.title: The Meta Quest 3 is about to be hit with a major price hike — grab the VR headset before it's too late
item.description: The Meta Quest 3 is about to get more expensive, so it's your last chance to buy the headset at the current price.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: A Meta Quest 3 and Meta Quest 3S alongside a candle, can of paintbrushes, and five markers

media:content.media:title: A Meta Quest 3 and Meta Quest 3S alongside a candle, can of paintbrushes, and five markers

item.title: Samsung's Galaxy XR can transform your content, but smart glasses might still be the better choice
item.description: The Galaxy XR's new Auto Spatialization feature is incredible when it works, but smart glasses from Xreal do it better.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: A pair of Xreal One Pro smart glasses next to a Samsung Galaxy XR headset
media:content.media:text: A pair of Xreal One Pro smart glasses next to a Samsung Galaxy XR headset
media:content.media:title: A pair of Xreal One Pro smart glasses next to a Samsung Galaxy XR headset

item.title: Spotify looks brand new on tablets with a design rework that makes total sense
item.description: Spotify debuted a massive rework for its tablet users, bringing an app refresh that is smarter and much smoother than before.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Spotify refreshes its app for tablets, giving users an experience that "adapts" to the orientation, and feels much smoother to use.
media:content.media:text: Spotify refreshes its app for tablets, giving users an experience that "adapts" to the orientation, and feels much smoother to use.
media:content.media:title: Spotify refreshes its app for tablets, giving users an experience that "adapts" to the orientation, and feels much smoother to use.

item.title: Easy as pie: Google's Gemini uses your memories for AI photos that feel personal
item.description: Google's Gemini announced a personalized image creation feature, which uses your Personal Intelligence data and Nano Banana 2 for images that mean more.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google's Gemini now merges its Personal Intelligence software with Nano Banana 2 to create images for users using simple prompts, as it leveraging their interests, lifestyle, photos, and more.
media:content.media:text: Google's Gemini now merges its Personal Intelligence software with Nano Banana 2 to create images for users using simple prompts, as it leveraging their interests, lifestyle, photos, and more.
media:content.media:title: Google's Gemini now merges its Personal Intelligence software with Nano Banana 2 to create images for users using simple prompts, as it leveraging their interests, lifestyle, photos, and more.

item.title: I tested the Moto G Stylus 2026, and it's finally starting to feel like an affordable alternative to the Galaxy S26 Ultra, but the price tag makes it a tougher sell
item.description: We tested Motorola's new Moto G Stylus 2026, and it offers a familiar experience in a familiar package, but it comes at a higher price.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Moto G Stylus 2026 in front of a fire place

item.title: You can now get YouTube Premium for half price with Google AI Pro
item.description: Google is offering 50% off the annual YouTube Premium subscription with its Google AI Pro plan.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: A Pixel 9a sitting next to an Android figurine showing the Google One AI Pro and AI Ultra plans.
media:content.media:text: A Pixel 9a sitting next to an Android figurine showing the Google One AI Pro and AI Ultra plans.
media:content.media:title: A Pixel 9a sitting next to an Android figurine showing the Google One AI Pro and AI Ultra plans.

item.title: Bowers & Wilkins' Px8 S2 has ruined all other headphones for me
item.description: With the Px8 S2, Bowers & Wilkins crafted what is possibly the best pair of headphones that I've used. They don't excel in all areas, but for what I need, they're ideal.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Bowers & Wilkins Px8 S2 headset next to Vivo X300 Pro with Spotify
media:content.media:text: Bowers & Wilkins Px8 S2 headset next to Vivo X300 Pro with Spotify
media:content.media:title: Bowers & Wilkins Px8 S2 headset next to Vivo X300 Pro with Spotify

item.title: Your Android phone could soon get a better way to sniff out spoofed calls
item.description: Google might bake smarter scam call detection into Android, using verified caller data and DNO checks to flag spoofed numbers before you answer.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Incoming call UI
media:content.media:text: Incoming call UI
media:content.media:title: Incoming call UI

item.title: YouTube finally gives us a way to turn off Shorts, sort of
item.description: YouTube now lets users limit Shorts by setting a zero-minute timer.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: YouTube Premium homepage on Android
media:content.media:text: YouTube Premium homepage on Android
media:content.media:title: YouTube Premium homepage on Android

item.title: I tested NVIDIA's GeForce Now in India — here's why it is the best cloud gaming service
item.description: NVIDIA just launched GeForce Now in India, and I got early access to the cloud gaming platform. After a week of testing, I can state with some confidence that this is the cloud gaming service we've all been waiting for, and the pricing is astonishingly good.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: NVIDIA GeForce Now testing in India
media:content.media:text: NVIDIA GeForce Now testing in India
media:content.media:title: NVIDIA GeForce Now testing in India

item.title: I'm pleasantly surprised by what NVIDIA GeForce Now costs in India
item.description: NVIDIA's GeForce Now is now live in India, and you'll like the pricing.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: NVIDIA GeForce Now testing in India
media:content.media:text: NVIDIA GeForce Now testing in India
media:content.media:title: NVIDIA GeForce Now testing in India

item.title: Spotify, Bookshop expand to US, and 'Page Match' gets huge language support
item.description: Spotify revealed a huge audiobook-centric update for Android users, expanding Page Match language support and its Bookshop partnership.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Spotify's Page Match lets users sync their physical book's placement with the audiobook version by scanning the page and jumping right in.
media:content.media:text: Spotify's Page Match lets users sync their physical book's placement with the audiobook version by scanning the page and jumping right in.
media:content.media:title: Spotify's Page Match lets users sync their physical book's placement with the audiobook version by scanning the page and jumping right in.

item.title: Amazon finally drops some good deals on the Samsung Galaxy S26 series, completely offsetting that pesky price hike

item.title: The Nothing Phone 4a Pro is nearly unbreakable, except for one design flaw
item.description: The Nothing Phone 4a Pro nails durability with its metal build, but small flaws like an exposed mic mesh keep it from being fully worry-free.

item.title: This limited-time Amazon Prime bundle finally makes Peacock and Apple TV worth paying for
item.description: If you're an Amazon Prime Video user that wants to keep all your subscriptions under on roof, you can now bundle Apple TV and Peacock and save.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: A TV show page on Prime Video
media:content.media:text: A TV show page on Prime Video
media:content.media:title: A TV show page on Prime Video
